title: Remove and replace mechanical units during vehicle repair
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Remove and replace mechanical units during vehicle repair demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to remove and replace mechanical units

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Removal and replacement specifications are sourced and interpreted from OEM and workplace procedures1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability1.5 Vehicle and work area are prepared according to workplace procedures1.6 Work is planned to identify methods, minimise waste and prevent damage to vehicle
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Removal and replacement specifications are sourced and interpreted from OEM and workplace procedures1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability1.5 Vehicle and work area are prepared according to workplace procedures1.6 Work is planned to identify methods, minimise waste and prevent damage to vehicle?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Removal and replacement specifications are sourced and interpreted from OEM and workplace procedures1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability1.5 Vehicle and work area are prepared according to workplace procedures1.6 Work is planned to identify methods, minimise waste and prevent damage to vehicle.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to remove and replace mechanical units

elements.title: Carry out removal and replacement activities

pcs.text: Mechanical units and assemblies are removed and replaced using approved procedures, hand tools and equipment and according to safety and environmental requirements2.2 Assistance from licensed persons is sought when removing and replacing air conditioning, LPG, or other alternative fuel systems and components2.3 Removal and replacement activities are completed according to OEM specifications and workplace procedures, and without causing damage to vehicle or components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Mechanical units and assemblies are removed and replaced using approved procedures, hand tools and equipment and according to safety and environmental requirements2.2 Assistance from licensed persons is sought when removing and replacing air conditioning, LPG, or other alternative fuel systems and components2.3 Removal and replacement activities are completed according to OEM specifications and workplace procedures, and without causing damage to vehicle or components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mechanical units and assemblies are removed and replaced using approved procedures, hand tools and equipment and according to safety and environmental requirements2.2 Assistance from licensed persons is sought when removing and replacing air conditioning, LPG, or other alternative fuel systems and components2.3 Removal and replacement activities are completed according to OEM specifications and workplace procedures, and without causing damage to vehicle or components.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out removal and replacement activities

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and vehicle is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored3.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and vehicle is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored3.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
